name: Harry Mugridg
tagline: Product Manager & Student at Royal Holloway
bio:
Hey, I'm Harry, I'm a Product Manager who's background spans product and strategy roles across Microsoft, Amazon and Spotify where I've worked on customer experience, product, growth and operations.

In addition to that, I am also currently a student at Royal Holloway, University of London studying Business and Management.

Scroll down below to learn more about me!
nowStatus: Version 1 of my website, feel free to look around!
